data.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AMENDMENT:

[MINOR] Debug-everything tag extraction is for documentation/transparency only — fix-bug is the authoritative source:
AC addition: 'The tag extraction added to debug-everything is for context/transparency only. The authoritative CLI_user check lives in fix-bug Step 1.5 and must work correctly in standalone /dso:fix-bug invocations without the caller providing tags. Do NOT make fix-bug Step 1.5 depend on the caller passing tags in context — it must call ticket show itself.'
